---
title: "Immersive Daylighting Design Schemas: An interactive Assistant for Spatial Design Learning"
tags: [Final, Arch 249]
---

# Abstract
This project explores how a VR system can teach daylighting design schemas through AI-assisted demonstration. Students ask questions and the mock-up AI provide design guidelines, immersing students into experiential design.

# Demo

![](https://youtu.be/7VvfqM0c2ws)

* The voice is generated by Generative AI Voiceover platform:  https://elevenlabs.io/

# Limitations
Due to time constraints, there is no recognition algorithm and real LLM AI involved. The entire VR system is hardcoded to represent the possibility of VR to perceive and interpret schemas. In addition, though using physically based lighting in VR, this rendering system is not validated against Radiance.
